hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -qE 'backend/src/.*[.]php$' && { printf '[%s] backend edit detected, running composer test
' $(date -Is) >> .claude/hooks/post-edit-test.log; (cd backend && XDEBUG_MODE=off composer test) >> .claude/hooks/post-edit-test.log 2>&1; printf 'exit=%s
' $? >> .claude/hooks/post-edit-test.log; } || true

hooks.statusMessage: Checking backend tests + frontend lint/build before push...
